summary: Verified tab bar bottom safe area fix. App loads successfully on mobile viewport (375x667), landing page renders correctly with Train Smarter / Play Better hero, Start Training and Upload Your Swing buttons visible. No React Native red screen, no pageerror events, and no safe-area / SafeAreaProvider / useSafeAreaInsets / tab-bar related console errors. Code review confirms SafeAreaProvider wraps AuthProvider + Stack in root _layout.tsx and home/_layout.tsx correctly uses useSafeAreaInsets() with tabBarStyle height=70+insets.bottom and paddingBottom=insets.bottom+8. react-native-safe-area-context ~5.6.0 present in package.json.
action_items: Fix cannot be fully validated on web preview because web has no home indicator inset (insets.bottom = 0 on web). Recommend main agent verify on a real iPhone (Expo Go / native build) that tab bar no longer overlaps the home indicator.
Optional: address shadow* / textShadow* deprecation warnings (use boxShadow / textShadow style props) - unrelated to this fix.
Optional: expo@54.0.35 vs expected ~54.0.36 mismatch shown in metro logs (non-blocking).
critical_code_review_comments: _layout.tsx correctly imports SafeAreaProvider from react-native-safe-area-context and wraps AuthProvider + Stack.
home/_layout.tsx correctly calls useSafeAreaInsets() at the top of the component and applies insets.bottom to tabBarStyle height and paddingBottom.
Package react-native-safe-area-context is declared in package.json (~5.6.0).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fix is code-correct and verified via web preview (no runtime/import errors). Actual iPhone home-indicator overlap can only be visually confirmed on a device or simulator, not on web (insets.bottom is 0 on web). Auth is Emergent Google OAuth - not tested here as landing-page verification was sufficient per the request.
rca_of_issue: Original bug: iPhone home indicator was overlapping tab bar because tabBarStyle used fixed height (60) and fixed paddingBottom (8), ignoring the device safe-area inset. Root cause: no SafeAreaProvider in the tree and no useSafeAreaInsets in the Tabs layout. Mitigation applied by main agent (verified): wrap the app in SafeAreaProvider in app/_layout.tsx and consume useSafeAreaInsets() in app/home/_layout.tsx to add insets.bottom to tab bar height and paddingBottom.
